name: Turtle Soup#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat from the bones and set aside, reserving the bones and gristle.
2. Add onions, celery, bay leaf, parsley, cloves, sugar, tomatoes, bones, gristle, and salt and pepper to water; heat until boiling.
3. Simmer covered for 1 hour.
4. Meanwhile, cut the meat into 1/4-inch dice and brown in butter.
5. Strain the broth and discard the bones and vegetables.
6. Add the browned meat and drippings. Simmer for 20-30 minutes until the meat is done and the broth is richly flavored.
7. Do not overcook.
8. Serve hot.
